2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch exports the `mhp_get_default_online_type` function from the Linux kernel's memory hotplug module, allowing drivers to access this function even when hotplug is disabled. This change enables drivers that use DAX (Direct Access) to build and function correctly in scenarios where hotplug is not enabled. The function itself simply returns `MMOP_OFFLINE`, which is a non-destructive option, ensuring compatibility with existing code.
